FR-001.title: Viewer state carries structured capability content (name, purpose, requirement rows) parsed extension-side

FR-002.title: Capability resolution reuses the Spec Explorer's config rules — no second resolver

FR-003.title: Card renders open per-capability disclosures with purpose + plain-text requirement rows

FR-004.title: Fold-back stays visible per capability, extended with delta counts when delta blocks exist

FR-005.title: Best-effort content loading: missing/unreadable/oversized degrade to name + unavailable note

FR-006.title: Injection-safe text nodes; token-driven theme-safe styling

FR-007.title: Stories cover rich/sparse/unavailable; parsing + derivation unit-tested

FR-008.title: Committed demo fixture exercises the card without enabling living specs in this repo

FR-009.title: README Activity section + root changelog updated in-change

context: area: src/features/spec-viewer stateDerivation + livingSpecsModel reuse + webview LivingSpecsCard
constraint: fixtures-only verification (user decision) — this repo's companion.yml and tree untouched
constraint: injection safety (text nodes), token theming, panel one-surface/disclosure design language
intent: Make the Activity panel show what the touched living specs actually say — purpose, requirements, and fold-back result — without opening raw files
expectations: scenario-tree rendering deferred — requirements-level content only this pass
no livingSpecs enablement or capabilities/ dir in this repo
no file watcher on capability specs this pass
approach: Provider-side enrichment: a new livingSpecsContent loader resolves names through readLivingSpecs, reads capped spec files, parses the fold-writer's own document shape into structured rows, and merges into the derived state; the card renders per-capability open disclosures with requirement rows, folded-back tags, and delta counts. Derivation stays pure; rich states are Storybook fixtures, the committed demo spec proves the degraded real-viewer path.

decisions.decision: enrich at the provider seam, derivation stays pure
decisions.why: existing injected-impure-data pattern; derivation tests stay fs-free
decisions.rejected: reader threaded into deriveViewerState or webview-side fetching

decisions.decision: parse the fold-writers own shape (### heading blocks) via readLivingSpecs resolution
decisions.why: one resolver (FR-002), parser aligned with the formats only writer
decisions.rejected: general markdown rendering or a second resolver

decisions.decision: delta = per-kind counts from the feature specs delta blocks
decisions.why: answers what-changed at a glance, matches fold targeting rules
decisions.rejected: full before/after diffs or git archaeology

decisions.decision: demo fixture carries the degraded path; Storybook carries the rich states
decisions.why: config-less repo (user decision) makes degraded the only honestly reachable real-viewer state
decisions.rejected: enabling living specs here (declined) or a nonexistent spec-local config

plan.summary: Plan + research + data model + UI contract; provider-seam loader, writer-aligned parser, counts-only deltas, split fixtures
plan.key_finding: the living-spec document shape is pinned by write-context.py (_REQ_HEADING_RE / span rules) — the TS parser mirrors it so both ends agree

tasks.summary: 15 tasks / 6 phases: types → loader → card+styles+provider, delta pass, degradation pass, fixtures+stories+docs; test file and card serialized
